title: Live visibility reconciliation — derive visible/headless from actual simulator/emulator window state
description:
Stop trusting stale session metadata for visibility. Reconcile visible/headless state from the actual desktop window state for Simulator and Android Emulator surfaces.

Acceptance criteria:
- simemu can derive current visibility from live desktop state instead of only sessions.json
- menubar counts and per-session badges reflect real visibility after external window changes
- parked sessions are never counted as visible/headless live devices
- tests cover missing, stale, and externally-changed visibility state
acceptanceCriteria: live visibility is derived from actual desktop state
menubar counts match externally changed window visibility
parked sessions are excluded from live visibility counts
tests cover stale and missing visibility metadata
